item.title: US economy added 130K jobs in January, delayed report shows
item.description: The U.S. economy added jobs at a steady pace to start the year, as the Labor Department reported that employers hired 130,000 workers in January 2026,...

item.title: FAA lifts El Paso flight restriction after US disables Mexican cartel drones that 'breached US airspace'
item.description: The Federal Aviation Administration walked back an order grounding all flights to and from the El Paso International Airport on Wednesday.

item.title: Jaguar Land Rover recalling 2,300 electric vehicles in US over fire risk
item.description: Jaguar Land Rover recalled nearly 2,300 I-Pace electric SUVs over a fire risk from overheating batteries, with owners urged to park outside and limit ...

item.title: Housing market cools as price growth hits slowest pace since Great Recession recovery
item.description: The housing market cooled dramatically as home price growth slowed to just 0.9% in December, the weakest pace since the economy was recovering from th...

item.title: Wyoming state board votes to cancel wind leases in two counties
item.description: State officials voted to begin canceling wind leases for projects in eastern Wyoming, citing a court ruling and concerns from residents over transpare...
